title: Gold Notches Second Weekly Loss as US-Iran Talks Hang in Limbo
title_cn: 由于美伊谈判悬而未决，金价连续第二周下跌
summary: Gold steadied as traders digested the latest developments in the standoff between the US and Iran that’s heightened inflation risks and dashed hopes for rate cuts from central banks across the world.

title: Lancôme Global Brand President on Tapping into Longevity
title_cn: 兰蔻全球品牌总裁谈进军长寿
summary: Lancôme Global Brand President Vania Lacascade discusses why longevity will be the next shift for the beauty industry, and how brands are tapping into the wellness boom. She talks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Archroma Reaches Final Terms on Much Delayed Loan Extension
title_cn: 昂高就拖延已久的贷款延期达成最终条款
summary: Specialty chemicals producer Archroma sweetened the terms on a junk loan deal to extend around $1 billion of debt, inching closer to completing a transaction that has faced multiple delays over the past month.

title: Pershing Square IPO Investors Post Gain After Free Shares
title_cn: 潘兴广场 IPO 投资者在免费股票后获利
summary: Investors in Bill Ackman’s new $5 billion closed-end fund ended the week with a small gain overall, once the value of the free shares they received in his asset management company is included.

title: LA’s Television City Studio Lot Faces Sale Forced by Lenders
title_cn: 洛杉矶电视城工作室地块面临贷款人强制出售
summary: Lenders are forcing Hollywood landlord Hackman Capital Partners, the largest independent studio and soundstage owner, to relinquish entertainment properties around Los Angeles as values plunge and demand stays soft.

title: Air Canada Pulls 2026 Outlook on Fuel Costs; Shares Drop
title_cn: 加拿大航空下调 2026 年燃油成本展望；股价下跌
summary: Air Canada suspended its full-year financial guidance because of the surge in jet fuel prices caused by the war in Iran.

title: Kevin Hart: Wanted 'Skin in the Game' in Tequila
title_cn: 凯文·哈特：希望在龙舌兰酒中“利益相关”
summary: Actor & Comedian Kevin Hart and Co-Founder of Gran Coramino James Morrisey discuss the growth of their tequila brand and the highly competitive celebrity-owned tequila space. They talk with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Online Games Where The House Always Wins
title_cn: 赌场总是获胜的在线游戏
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder and Bloomberg reporter Vernon Silver go inside the world of casino-style games like Monopoly GO! and High 5 Casino to understand who’s profiting the most from their rise and the increased scrutiny on how they do business.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Assets Climb on Iran’s New Proposal in Thin Trading
title_cn: 新兴资产因伊朗新提案而在清淡交易中攀升
summary: Emerging-market benchmarks for stocks and currencies advanced in thin holiday trading, as Iran delivered a new proposal to the US via Pakistan over the Strait of Hormuz, pushing crude lower.

title: Retailer West Marine Readies Possible Bankruptcy to Close Stores
title_cn: 零售商 West Marine 准备破产以关闭商店
summary: Boat retailer West Marine Inc. is laying the groundwork for a potential Chapter 11 bankruptcy to restructure its debt, including leases, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Fresh Concerns for Private Credit as Milken Looms
title_cn: 米尔肯迫近对私人信贷的新担忧
summary: Bloomberg’s James Crombie and Davide Scigliuzzo joins Scarlet Fu on “Bloomberg Real Yield.” Milken Institute Global Conference marks a potential inflection point for private credit as global and financial leaders meet in Beverly Hills next week.

title: Harbinger's Williams: Sports are at an Inflection Point
title_cn: Harbinger 威廉姆斯：体育正处于拐点
summary: Harbinger Sports Partners Founder Rashuan Williams discusses the 'explosion' and diversification of revenue by many sports franchises, and the switch to 'sports 2.0,' a new business model aimed at maximizing real estate surrounding sporting venues. He talks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says Too Soon to Buy
title_cn: 看到抛售即将到来的 Shopify 分析师表示，现在买入还为时过早
summary: The analyst who slapped the only sell rating on Shopify Inc. over valuation concerns ahead of its blistering rout said it’s still too soon to jump back in.

title: Brooks Apparel 'Resonating' With Chinese Runners, Says CEO Dan Sheridan
title_cn: 首席执行官 Dan Sheridan 表示，Brooks Apparel 与中国跑步者产生了“共鸣”
summary: Dan Sheridan, CEO of Brooks Running, said that his company is resonating with runners in China as the activewear brand grew over a 130% in the region. Sheridan said that while China remains a small percentage of Brooks' business, the 'everyone's a runner' positioning and multi-use clothing consumers can wear off the run is driving growth.  Sheridan joined Bloomberg Businessweek from the floor of the Berkshire Hathaway shareholder conference in Omaha. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Bulls Power Longest Weekly Rally Since 2024: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市多头推动 2024 年以来最长的每周上涨：市场总结
summary: A record-breaking run drove stocks to their longest weekly advance since 2024 amid hopes for a deal to end the Iran war that has rattled financial markets and jeopardized the economic outlook.

title: Stocks Hold Record Highs | Closing Bell
title_cn: 股票保持历史新高|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fast-Money Hedge Fund Trades Roar as Wall Street Defies Gloom
title_cn: 华尔街摆脱低迷，快钱对冲基金交易狂飙
summary: Wall Street is back in triumphant mode, with stocks at records, risk appetites refreshed — and alternative strategies that run on their own engine winning, too.

title: Big Oil Bosses Warn Energy Is Moving Closer to Cliff’s Edge
title_cn: 石油巨头警告能源正在接近悬崖边缘
summary: America’s biggest oil companies are warning that global crude markets may be nearing an inflection point of higher prices the longer the Strait of Hormuz stays closed.

title: Stocks Hit Record as Oil Falls on US-Iran Hopes
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的希望导致油价下跌，股市创下历史新高
summary: A record-breaking run drove stocks toward their longest weekly rally since 2024 amid hopes for a deal to end the Iran war that has rattled financial markets and jeopardized the economic outlook. Jaya Thibard Wajja, head of FX strategy at TD Securities, and Bloomberg's Jeff Mason join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Economic Resilience Lowers Rate Cut Odds, Private Credit Fears | Real Yield 5/1/2026
title_cn: 美国经济韧性降低降息可能性和私人信贷担忧实际收益率 5/1/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Wolfe Research Chief Economist Stephanie Roth, Economic Security Project Senior Director of Policy and Research Mike Konczal, BNP Paribas Head of US Credit Strategy Meghan Robson, and CreditSights Global Head of Strategy Winnie Cisar. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The US is Going to Win This Space Race Says Rep. Haridopolos
title_cn: 众议员哈里多波洛斯表示，美国将赢得这场太空竞赛
summary: Rep. Mike Haridopolos, representing Florida's 8th Congressional District joins Balance of Power to discuss the ending of the DHS shutdown as well as the ongoing war in Iran and the future of space exploration. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Believes They Outlast the US Says Mona Yacoubian
title_cn: 莫娜·雅库比安表示，伊朗相信他们比美国更长寿
summary: President Donald Trump expressed displeasure with the current state of negotiations with Iran but stopped short of threatening fresh military action in the nine-week conflict that’s triggered a global energy crisis. Mona Yacoubian, Director of the Middle East Program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, joins Bloomberg to discuss the ongoing diplomatic deadlock regarding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Magna CEO Says New Trump Tariffs Will Spare Partsmaker
title_cn: 麦格纳首席执行官表示，特朗普新关税将令零部件制造商陷入困境
summary: Magna International Inc.'s chief executive officer, Swamy Kotagiri, discusses the auto-parts supplier's outlook and President Donald Trump's new tariffs on cars and trucks made in the European Union. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chevron CFO Bonner on Earnings, Buyback and Oil Prices
title_cn: 雪佛龙首席财务官邦纳谈盈利、回购和油价
summary: Chevron CFO Eimear Bonner says the company's portfolio is resilient to recent geopolitical risks. Speaks on "Bloomberg The Close," Bonner also comments on the company's buyback strategy and rising oil prices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Retail Traders Burnt on Both Sides of April’s Chip Rip: ETF IQ
title_cn: 四月份芯片撕裂的两面都烧伤了零售交易者：ETF IQ
summary: SOXL and SOXS saw billions of dollars in wrong-way bets in April

title: Oil Falls on Hopes for US-Iran Negotiations, Hormuz Progress
title_cn: 美伊谈判的希望和霍尔木兹海峡的进展导致油价下跌
summary: Oil edged lower in thin trading on Friday with US-Iran peace negotiations on the ropes but still in play, leading some traders to peel back risk ahead of the weekend.

title: Citadel's Griffin, Gov. Hochul Meet Amid NYC Spat
title_cn: Citadel 的格里芬和州长 Hochul 在纽约市争执中会面
summary: Bloomberg's Laura Nahmias joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Citadel’s Ken Griffin reportedly met this week with New York Governor Kathy Hochul after a spat with Mayor Zohran Mamdani that centered on Griffin's $238 million Manhattan penthouse.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mount Sinai Announces Rowan Women's Heath Center
title_cn: 西奈山宣布设立罗文妇女健康中心
summary: Dr. Fanny Elahi, Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai Associate Professor of Neurology and Neuroscience joins to discuss Mount Sinai's new Rowan Women’s Health Center. Dr. Elahi also discussed neurodegenerative disease, aging, midlife intervention in women on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EBay Soars on Report That GameStop Is Preparing a Takeover Bid
title_cn: 有报道称 GameStop 正在准备收购要约，eBay 股价飙升
summary: EBay Inc. jumped more than 13% in after-hours trading on Friday after the Wall Street Journal reported that video-game retailer GameStop Corp. is preparing a bid for the company.

title: Apple Raises Mac Mini’s Starting Price to $799 After AI Frenzy Drains Supply
title_cn: AI 狂热耗尽供应后，苹果将 Mac Mini 的起价提高至 799 美元
summary: Apple Inc. raised the starting price of its Mac mini desktop to $799 from $599, adjusting to inventory shortages driven by AI demand and the tight supply of processors.

title: Fmr. BET CEO Debra Lee on Media Landscape, Handbag Line
title_cn: 先生。 BET 首席执行官 Debra Lee 谈媒体格局、手袋系列
summary: Former BET Chair & CEO Debra Lee discusses the changing media landscape, why good content will always find its audience, and her new luxury handbag line. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: Disney’s New CEO Is Exploring a ‘Super App’ For Theme Park Tickets, Movies and More
title_cn: 迪士尼新任首席执行官正在探索主题公园门票、电影等的“超级应用程序”
summary: Walt Disney Co. senior executives are discussing how to unify the company’s disparate mobile apps and turn its streaming service into the first stop for all things Disney, a place where users can book park tickets, buy merchandise, play games and watch movies, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Stocks Close at New Record High Capping Solid Earnings Week
title_cn: 美国股市收盘创历史新高，为本周稳健的盈利奠定基础
summary: The S&P 500 Index extended a record-breaking streak Friday to mark a fifth week of gains after solid earnings from tech mega caps. Oil dropped amid hopes that the US and Iran were getting closer to a ceasefire agreement.

title: Nuclear AI Startup Fermi Promised Land and Ample Power. But It Couldn't Sign a Single Client
title_cn: 核人工智能初创公司费米承诺土地和充足的电力。但它无法签署单个客户
summary: Now the ex-CEO is waging a battle for Fermi’s future and its vision of atomic-powered data centers in the Texas panhandle.

title: OpenAI’s Revenue Chief Says Enterprise Business ‘Accelerating’
title_cn: OpenAI 收入主管表示企业业务“加速”
summary: A recent report raised concerns about OpenAI missing its growth targets.

title: The Online Games Where the House Always Wins
title_cn: 赌场总是获胜的在线游戏
summary: Online casino-style games like Monopoly GO! are huge. Could new scrutiny challenge how they do business?

title: Apple Forecasts Sales Growth Amid Memory Shortage | Bloomberg Tech 5/1/2026
title_cn: 苹果预测内存短缺导致销量增长彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Apple’s strong outlook amid the continued memory supply crunch. Plus, Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki discusses the gaming platform’s "aggressive push to enhance safety" that tempered user growth. And, Bloomberg spoke with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar who pushes back on a report that the AI leader is missing its own targets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Some Investor 'Choosiness' for AI Debt: Cisar
title_cn: Cisar：一些投资者对人工智能债务“挑剔”
summary: Winnie Cisar, global head of strategy at CreditSights, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO Turns to AI and Quantum Computing to Predict Earthquakes
title_cn: BMO 利用人工智能和量子计算来预测地震
summary: Bank of Montreal is betting on artificial intelligence and quantum computing to help predict earthquakes and respond to wildfires as part of the Canadian bank’s expansion in the US.

title: Roblox Shares Dive on Slower User Growth
title_cn: Roblox 股价因用户增长放缓而暴跌
summary: Roblox stock plummeted after the company slashed its full-year bookings forecast, admitting that new age-verification and child-safety features are creating major short-term friction for user growth. Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twilio CEO on Its ‘Milestone Quarter’
title_cn: Twilio 首席执行官谈其“里程碑季度”
summary: Twilio reported its fastest revenue growth in over three years, fueled by a massive surge in AI-driven demand. Twilio CEO Khozema Shipchandler discussed what he called a “milestone quarter” with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar says the company is meeting objectives and sees a “vertical wall of demand” for its products. Bloomberg's Shirin Ghaffary joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow to discuss those comments on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Hacker Pleads Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Attacks
title_cn: 俄罗斯黑客承认袭击石油和天然气设施
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries pleaded guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison.

title: BMO's Milchanowski on Quantum's Banking Sector Impact
title_cn: BMO 的 Milchanowski 谈量子对银行业的影响
summary: BMO Chief AI and Quantum Officer Kristin Milchanowski discusses how cutting edge AI and quantum tech will impact business, and the banking sector, for the foreseeable future. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Final Fantasy XIV’ Faces Key Test as Thousands of Fans Gather
title_cn: 数千粉丝齐聚，《最终幻想14》面临关键考验
summary: The longrunning online game has a lot of work to do to recover from the disappointing ‘Dawntrail’ expansion

title: Meta Acquires Robotics AI Company to Help Build Humanoid Technology
title_cn: Meta 收购 Robotics AI 公司，帮助构建人形技术
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup developing artificial intelligence models for robots, as part of a major initiative to build humanoid technology.

title: Roblox to Challenge Unity, Unreal Engines With New AI Software
title_cn: Roblox 将利用新的 AI 软件挑战 Unity 和虚幻引擎
summary: Roblox Corp. is launching a new product that will position its popular video-game creation software to better compete with Unity Software Inc. and Epic Games, whose engines are used by most big-budget game-makers.

title: US Economy 'Incredibly Resilient': Mossavar-Rahmani
title_cn: 莫萨瓦尔-拉赫马尼：美国经济“极其有弹性”
summary: Sharmin Mossavar-Rahmani, wealth management CIO and head of the investment strategy group at Goldman Sachs, says the US economy has been "incredibly resilient" despite the impact of the Iran war. She joined "Bloomberg Surveillance" on April 30 to discuss how significant AI spending by Big Tech and restrictive monetary policies are shaping market dynamics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar pushed back on concerns about missing internal targets, saying the company is meeting objectives and sees “a vertical wall of demand” for its products.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Hand Pentagon More Control Over AI Systems Use
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊让五角大楼对人工智能系统的使用有更多控制权
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: Tether’s Gold Hoard Nears $20 Billion as Buying Continues
title_cn: 随着购买的继续，Tether 的黄金储备接近 200 亿美元
summary: Tether Holdings SA bought more than six tons of gold for its reserves in the first three months of the year, extending a buying streak that’s made it the largest known holder of bullion in the world outside of banks and nation states.

title: What’s Tech’s Next iPhone Moment?
title_cn: iPhone 的下一个科技时刻是什么？
summary:
Will OpenAI ever bring a smartphone, or some other smartphone-like device, to market?

On this episode of the Everybody's Business podcast, we are joined by Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman, the author of the Power On newsletter and managing editor for consumer technology. He tells Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin whether such a device could succeed and what the next iPhone moment might look like. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank-Tied Deal Raises Nearly $1 Billion for US Data Centers
title_cn: 软银联合交易为美国数据中心筹集近 10 亿美元资金
summary: A data-center developer sold $999 million of junk bonds for a project leased to a SoftBank Group Corp. subsidiary, capping April’s surge of debt issuance to help fund artificial intelligence efforts amid some concerns that such spending won’t pay off.

title: Roblox Shares Fall Most in Four Years on Slowing User Growth
title_cn: 由于用户增长放缓，Roblox 股价出现四年来最大跌幅
summary: Roblox Corp. shares plunged the most in more than four years on Friday after the video game company reported fewer daily users in the first quarter than analysts expected, due to safety features it implemented to restrict how kids can use the platform.

title: OpenAI CFO Cites ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官引用产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar sees “a vertical wall of demand” for the company’s products as she pushed back Thursday on concerns about missing internal targets in a Bloomberg interview. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Caterpillar’s Biggest Bear Folds as AI Power Demand Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能电力需求飙升，卡特彼勒最大的熊市倒闭
summary: Caterpillar Inc.’s biggest Wall Street bear has thrown in the towel after watching the stock more than double on the back of surging demand for the company’s power generation equipment.

title: Senate Trending Toward Dems in '26: Taylor
title_cn: 泰勒：26 年参议院倾向于民主党
summary: Jessica Taylor, Senate and Governors Editor for the Cook Political Report, says the 2026 Senate map is "trending in Democrats' direction," citing the lingering Iran conflict and rising gas prices as political headwinds for Republicans. She flags candidate risks in key contests, warning Democrats' path in Maine could be complicated by a "risky" nominee with "baggage." In Texas, she says the race could shift depending on whether Republicans nominate John Cornyn or Ken Paxton, with Paxton seen as more vulnerable against Democrat James Talarico, though the seat remains GOP-favored. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Owes Congress Iran Plan: Rep. Vindman
title_cn: 白宫欠国会伊朗计划：众议员温德曼
summary: Representative Eugene Vindman (D-VA), a retired US Army officer and member of the House Armed Services Committee, says the administration “owes” Congress an explanation of its Iran strategy as the conflict nears the 60-day mark, warning the ceasefire is only a temporary pause. He disputes President Trump’s claims on munitions stockpiles and calls the administration’s approach to Ukraine and Russia “all wrong” and “chaos.” Vindman also blasts Republicans over the DHS shutdown, saying the prolonged standoff caused “more chaos, more cruelty, more pain.” He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Orders Withdrawal of About 5,000 Troops From Germany
title_cn: 美国下令从德国撤军约5000人
summary: The US has ordered the drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany, following through on President Donald Trump’s threats to reduce the American military presence in the country. Cohen Group Senior Adviser Jen Gavito discusses the Pentagon's decision on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Orders Withdrawal of About 5,000 Troops From Germany
title_cn: 五角大楼下令从德国撤军约5000人
summary: The US has ordered the drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany, following through on President Donald Trump’s threats to reduce the American military presence in the country, as tensions escalate over the war with Iran.

title: Japan’s Takaichi to Revamp Indo-Pacific Vision in Vietnam Speech
title_cn: 日本高市将在越南演讲中修改印太愿景
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi on Saturday will use a speech in Vietnam to lay out her vision for the Indo-Pacific, as she seeks to bolster economic and security ties across the region in a move that could counter an increasingly assertive China.

title: Trump Bemoans Iran Talks, Magna CEO Talks News Trump Tariffs | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗谈判表示哀叹，麦格纳首席执行官发表讲话彭博商业周刊日报 5/1/2026
summary: On today's episode, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Jayati Bharadwaj, TD Head of FX Strategy on FX and Jeff Mason, Bloomberg News White House Correspondent, about the latest on negotiations, and the latest announcement on tariffs being reimposed on EU carmakers. They also speak with Magna International CEO Swamy Kotagiri, and the CEO of Brooks Running Dan Sheridan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: There’s More Trade Drama Ahead for US Deal With Mexico, Canada
title_cn: 美国与墨西哥和加拿大的贸易协议即将上演更多戏剧性事件
summary: The Pact with US Neighbors Is Under Review Ahead of a July Deadline.

title: Trump Rues State of Iran Talks, Says Prefers Not to Strike
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗国情谈判表示遗憾，表示宁愿不发动袭击
summary: President Donald Trump expressed displeasure with the current state of negotiations with Iran but stopped short of threatening fresh military action in the nine-week conflict that’s triggered a global energy crisis.

title: Trump Says 'Not Happy' on Iran, Touts Hormuz Closure | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示对伊朗“不满意”，并吹捧霍尔木兹海峡关闭权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's stance on Iran as he considers the path forward on Iran and tells lawmakers that he doesn't need congressional approval for military operations in the region. On today's show, Director and senior adviser of the Middle East Program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies Mona Yacoubian, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck and Republican Strategist Rosemary Becchi, and Republican Congressman from Florida Mike Haridopolos. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Plans 25% Tariff on European Autos
title_cn: 特朗普计划对欧洲汽车征收 25% 关税
summary: President Donald Trump says he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming the bloc is not complying with a trade agreement. Tyler Kendall reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Vows 25% Tariff on European Autos in Escalating Trade Rift
title_cn: 贸易裂痕升级 特朗普誓言对欧洲汽车征收25%关税
summary: President Donald Trump said he was raising tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25%, claiming that the bloc had failed to fully comply with a trade agreement negotiated with the US.

title: US Sanctions Iran Exchanges, China Terminal on Oil Purchases
title_cn: 美国制裁伊朗交易所和中国码头购买石油
summary: The Trump administration sanctioned three Iranian currency exchanges and a Chinese oil terminal on Friday, as the US adds to pressure on Tehran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Warns Shippers of Possible Sanctions If They Pay Hormuz Tolls
title_cn: 美国警告托运人如果支付霍尔木兹通行费可能会受到制裁
summary: The US government issued a warning about the sanctions risk of paying tolls to Iran for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, which has been shut since the war against Tehran began.

title: Sheinbaum to Announce Steps to Boost Mexico’s Private Investment
title_cn: 希因鲍姆将宣布采取措施促进墨西哥私人投资
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum said she will announce on Monday a series of measures aimed at strengthening private investment in Mexico, centered on a “radical simplification” of bureaucratic procedures.

title: Trump Ramps Up Pressure on Cuba With Fresh Sanctions Push
title_cn: 特朗普通过新的制裁加大对古巴的压力
summary: President Donald Trump imposed new sanctions on top Cuban officials, the White House said, part of a months-long push by the administration to ramp up economic and security pressure on the island.

title: Trump Administration to Appeal Ruling on NYC Congestion Toll
title_cn: 特朗普政府将对纽约市拥堵收费裁决提出上诉
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration is continuing its push to end New York City’s congestion pricing program by appealing a decision by a federal judge that allowed the tolling plan to proceed.

title: Brazil’s Bolsonaro Undergoes Successful Shoulder Surgery
title_cn: 巴西博尔索纳罗成功接受肩部手术
summary: Former President Jair Bolsonaro underwent a successful surgical procedure on his right shoulder Friday at a hospital in Brasilia and is currently recuperating in an inpatient unit for pain management and clinical observation, according to the hospital statement.

title: EU Parliament Trade Chief Calls Trump Tariff Threat Unacceptable
title_cn: 欧盟议会贸易负责人称特朗普关税威胁不可接受
summary: The head of the European Parliament’s trade committee called President Donald Trump’s threat to boost tariffs on EU cars and trucks “unacceptable,” and criticized the US for being an unreliable partner.

title: Trump Says Still Looking at Spirit, Final Proposal Delivered
title_cn: 特朗普表示仍在考虑精神，最终提案已交付
summary: President Donald Trump said the federal government was still looking at a rescue plan for Spirit Airlines and had delivered a “final proposal.”

title: Trump Says He Will ‘Probably’ Go to G-7 Summit in France
title_cn: 特朗普称他“可能”前往法国参加七国集团峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump indicated he plans to attend the Group of Seven leaders’ summit in France in June, even with the US at odds with key allies over the Iran war and trade.

title: Trump Says US Still Looking at Spirit, Will Give Final Proposal
title_cn: 特朗普称美国仍在考虑精神号，将给出最终建议
summary: President Donald Trump says the federal government was still looking at a rescue plan for Spirit Airlines and would offer a final proposal soon during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Surprise Colombian Rate Decision Helps Avoid Volatility, Central Banker Says
title_cn: 央行行长表示，哥伦比亚出人意料的利率决定有助于避免波动
summary: Colombia’s surprise decision to halt interest rate increases this week was intended to prevent upheaval, but may come at a cost, according to central bank co-director Mauricio Villamizar.

title: Tracking Trump’s Tariffs Across the Global Economy
title_cn: 追踪特朗普在全球经济中的关税
summary: For the full experience visit: Tracking Trump's Tariffs Across the Global Economy

title: Anger and Fear Overwhelms London’s Golders Green After Antisemitic Attack
title_cn: 反犹太主义袭击后，愤怒和恐惧淹没了伦敦的戈尔德斯绿地
summary: Abraham was studying in a synagogue in Golders Green, north London, on Wednesday morning when someone rushed in with a warning: lock the doors, an attacker is on the rampage. Just outside, two Jewish men had been stabbed. Police surrounded the assailant, and arrested him on suspicion of attempted murder. For the 40–year-old Israeli, a visit to friends became a reminder of how quickly a sense of normality can shatter, even far from home.

title: US Sanctions Congo Ex-President Joseph Kabila for Rebel Ties
title_cn: 美国因与叛军关系而制裁刚果前总统约瑟夫·卡比拉
summary: The US sanctioned Joseph Kabila, the former president of the Democratic Republic of Congo, for his ties to a rebel group occupying a large part of the country’s mineral-rich east.

title: Lula Unveils Debt Relief Program Ahead of Elections
title_cn: 卢拉在选举前推出债务减免计划
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva on Thursday announced a program to renegotiate household debt, his latest measure to support consumption as he seeks to bolster his popularity ahead of Brazil’s October election.

title: Economic Crosscurrents Mount as Energy Shock Meets AI Wave
title_cn: 能源冲击与人工智能浪潮相遇，经济逆流加剧
summary: The global economy is increasingly captive to two opposing forces.

title: Trump’s US Tariffs Turn UK Trade Surpluses Into Deficits
title_cn: 特朗普的美国关税将英国贸易顺差变成赤字
summary: President Donald Trump’s tariffs have resulted in a sharp fall in UK exports to the US, turning British trade surpluses into deficits in a dramatic reversal of transatlantic trade dynamics, according to official data.

title: GOP Steers Clear on Iran as War Hits Key 60-Day Milestone
title_cn: 随着战争达到 60 天的关键里程碑，共和党不再关注伊朗问题
summary: Trump is looking to buy more time to reach a deal, and most Republicans are glad to give it.
